appraisal_events.evidence: « Ah ! je croyais le contraire, dit Bloch qui se figurait que duchesse de Guermantes avait parlé sincèrement. Il continua, au grand désespoir de Norpois… »
appraisal_events.explanation: Bloch misses the duchess’s irony and persists with questions, provoking Norpois’s despair; he appears socially awkward and ill-suited to salon codes.

status_effects.explanation: His misunderstanding and insistence make him seem naive and ill-fitted to society usages.
